visa_types.name: Visa Tourism

Checklist of required documents
Visa application form (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sen/en/che/book-an-appointment)
Visit Switzerland in Senegal embassy website (https://www.schweiz-senegal.eda.admin.ch/fr/demande-visa-schengen-procedure)
visa_types.visa_fees:
VFS Global offers an optional additional service to visa applicants in Senegal, with extra charges borne by the applicant. 
To know the official visa fees charged by the Swiss Government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/senegal/fr/home/visa/entree-ch/jusq-a-90-jours/emoluments-schengen.html):
VFS Service Fee: 15,500 CFA (including VAT) for biometric submission. Payment is cash only. Fees are non‑refundable.

The consulate generally decides within 15 days. It may take longer in individual cases. Applications should be submitted early, up to 6 months before travel. 
For Gambian citizens, the processing time takes 45 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is intended for applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for leisure, relaxation, or tourism.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended for applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for leisure, relaxation, or tourism.

## Visa Fees
VFS Global offers an optional additional service to visa applicants in Senegal, with extra charges borne by the applicant. 
To know the official visa fees charged by the Swiss Government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/senegal/fr/home/visa/entree-ch/jusq-a-90-jours/emoluments-schengen.html):
VFS Service Fee: 15,500 CFA (including VAT) for biometric submission. Payment is cash only. Fees are non‑refundable.

## Required Documents
Checklist of required documents
Visa application form (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sen/en/che/book-an-appointment)
Visit Switzerland in Senegal embassy website (https://www.schweiz-senegal.eda.admin.ch/fr/demande-visa-schengen-procedure)

## Photo Specifications
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6cwki7jx1ZTIFwAKGgS8Zh/3a433026d1496cab12db5c414e659ff8/Annex-A-Photograph-Guidelines.pdf) for photo specifications

## Processing Time
The consulate generally decides within 15 days. It may take longer in individual cases. Applications should be submitted early, up to 6 months before travel. 
For Gambian citizens, the processing time takes 45 days.

## Downloadable Forms
Declaration of consent (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6zG9fLmDFO0UKXqUuOmDlj/f8de7f96271ae7f2cb24ef8bea104df6/declaration_of_consent.pdf)

For applicants traveling to Switzerland for official or business purposes such as meetings, conferences, training, trade fairs.

Overview
This visa is intended for applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for Sport, and cultural purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended for applicants who wish to travel to Switzerland for Sport, and cultural purposes.

## Visa Fees
VFS Global offers an optional additional service to visa applicants in Senegal, with extra charges borne by the applicant. 
To know the official visa fees charged by the Swiss Government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/senegal/fr/home/visa/entree-ch/jusq-a-90-jours/emoluments-schengen.html):
VFS Service Fee: 15,500 CFA (including VAT) for biometric submission. Payment is online while booking the appointment or in cash/ by credit card at the Visa application center. The service fees are non‑refundable.

## Required Documents
Checklist of required documents
Visa application form (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sen/en/che/book-an-appointment)
Visit Switzerland in Senegal embassy website (https://www.schweiz-senegal.eda.admin.ch/fr/demande-visa-schengen-procedure)

## Photo Specifications
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6cwki7jx1ZTIFwAKGgS8Zh/3a433026d1496cab12db5c414e659ff8/Annex-A-Photograph-Guidelines.pdf) for photo specifications

## Processing Time
The consulate generally decides within 15 days. It may take longer in individual cases. Applications should be submitted early, up to 6 months before travel. 
For Gambian citizens, the processing time takes 45 days.

## Downloadable Forms
Declaration of consent (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6zG9fLmDFO0UKXqUuOmDlj/f8de7f96271ae7f2cb24ef8bea104df6/declaration_of_consent.pdf)
